title: Viborg、Central Jutland — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Viborg、Central Jutlandの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

ViborgはCentral Jutlandにある人口42,000の都市です。One of Denmark’s oldest cities, known for its twin-towered cathedral, lake district, and historic town square.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
